skills.name: Dark Judgement
skills.description: An explosion occurs around the targeted enemy, leaving [Mark] debuff on the damaged enemy.

skills.name: Guided Shot
skills.description: Shoot 5 arrows at random enemy ahead, and the enemy shot receives [Mark] debuff that lasts for 5 seconds.

skills.name: Fanwise Shots
skills.description: Shoot multiple arrows forward in a fan shape.

skills.name: Escape
skills.description: Move to the back at a fast speed, shoot an arrow at an enemy ahead, and leave [Mark] debuff for 5 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Evasion/Block increases by CaptionRatio %
Movement Speed increases for CaptionRatio2 second(s)

skills.name: Dead Zone
skills.description: Rain down arrows to attack nearby enemies continuously.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second x 4
Target: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Shining Burst
skills.description: Hold the skill key to shoot arrows while spinning. You can move during channeling.

attributes.name: Dark Judgement: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dark Judgement] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Dead Zone: Exterminate
attributes.description:
* Increases the target for one hit by 7

* Increases cooldown by 5 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Targeted Arrow: Additional Damage
attributes.description: * Additional damage applies with increased value by [10 + attribute level * 10]% when Targeted Arrow is accurate.

attributes.name: Targeted Arrow
attributes.description:
* Fire Targeted Arrow by [2.5 * attribute level]% chance when attacking the enemy with [Mark] applied by yourself

(The damage of Targeted Arrow is equal to 25% of the damage dealt by yourself and the critical hit does not occur)
